message:
fix: Linux x86_64 portability fixes

- native_main_embed.zig: comptime select __stdoutp/__stderrp (macOS) vs stdout/stderr (Linux)
- native_bindings.zig: comptime select stat.mtimespec (macOS) vs stat.mtim (Linux)
- polyfills/os.zig: use std.posix.HOST_NAME_MAX instead of hardcoded 72
- Restore wasm_bump.zig and wyhash.zig (accidentally deleted in earlier refactor)
